transcript.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. Para español, oprima el dos.
Hello, do you accept Blue Cross Blue
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.
Oh, I’m sorry, I think there might be some confusion. I’m not Jordan. I’m actually calling as a patient. Let me start over: Hello, do you accept Blue Cross Blue Shield?
Tenet Point Orthopedics accepts most insurance plans, including Blue Cross Blue Shield.
Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Thank you so much for confirming that. That’s exactly what I needed to know. I appreciate your help!
If you have any other questions or need to schedule an appointment, just let me know.
